race.description: Souths Sports Club 3YO Fillies Maiden Plate
race.comment: CERETTI (4) has been right there in all four runs this preparation and strikes a very winnable contest here. Gets the services of Thompson in the irons and should be right there when the whips are cracking. PEARLS IN JUNE (6) boasts a placing over this distance range and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. Looms as the main danger. MERCATELLO (5) maps ideally for this from gate two and gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Top-three chance. BOOZIE MISS (3) was a touch disappointing when resuming but will have come on with that run now under the belt. Deserves some consideration. RUSSIAN TEMPEST (8) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and a watch on betting is advised.
